item.title: Some of my most recent illustrations. May 2024
item.description: Thanks for the kind comments and the upvotes! If you like my work you can support me on Ko-fi (https://ko-fi.com/simzart) with any small donation or Patreon (https://www.patreon.com/simz). See you next time with a new gallery! ❤️

item.title: Its so simple!
item.description: EDIT: Wow, that was fast, thanks a lot everyone! Remember to win 3 Million to make... 3 Million! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, feel free to visit https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ EDIT2: It was brought to my attention that this is, in fact, a parody account on twitter (thus why the bond rate is insanely high)... I honestly couldn't tell because my last boss did say something of the sort.
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: I still choose bears!
item.description: Sauce: https://www.kuow.org/stories/bear-eats-family-ducks-ducklings-seattle-zoo Happy weekend and thanks for most viral!
item.dc:creator: DesdemonaMoor

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a batch of memes as love note. Dad jokes, advice, words of affirmation, dank memes, daily music jams, nightmare fuel and oddities. Here’s the latest batch. #DFTBA
item.description:
I love you. Be kind to yourselves.
Hello there.
Goodbye there!
When I was a kid: this was the definition of heaven.
I sent this on a Wednesday. Don’t give me crap about sharing with with Imgur on a Friday.
Frog part 2
Frogs part 3.
Frogs part 4 (I had a frog themed day)
Frogs part 5
Frogs part 6
Frogs part 7
This morning’s jam. Enjoy yourself today even if work isn’t fun.
I’ve seen a multi minute version of this and the guy on the left bops around like he’s powered by cocaine the whole time.
Hello, Better Ken.
Hahahaha.
I love you. I’m here.
Today’s jam. Let’s get #funky.
I love you. Change is hard.
You’re special. Not exactly right in the head. But special.
I shall refer to you as semen demons in private then.
Semen demons.
Respect the dad dance.
Beware geese.
Today’s jam.
You deserve love and happiness.
Be good. You’re being watched.
The only wrong way to eat a Reese’s is to eat them one at a time until you throw up.
Did you notice this? I didn’t. Now I have to go back and watch it to see if the meme is true.
Guess who?
This was on tv in prime time at one point. There’s a whole generation of human beings for whom this is the definitive Batman. Not the Dark Knight. You asked for the definition of “campy?” It’s this. This is the DEFINITION of campy.
Dad joke hoo ha ha.
Beware the geese.
Sweet dreams. I love you.
Sweet dreams. I love you. Weirdos.
Today’s jam.
Treat each other right.
I love you.
You don’t deserve lemon juice.
With your eyes.
Raccoon.
Sons use the salad forks despite being the largest people in the family.
Frogs part 8. I oopsed and didn’t keep these together.
Good morning jam!
Ian!
It’s logical, actually.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: I’m finally escaping
item.description: In three weeks I’m going to start my new job as a member of IBEW. Fuck this place, the people, the politics, the heat, humidity **Edit for most viral** never made most viral before! Thanks for all the well wishers, I’m so excited
item.dc:creator: Dookhammer

item.title: Car ownership was once a luxury, not an obligation

item.title: Time for a bottom shelf story. TL:DR (Don't worry, there are memes too)
item.description:
For context, I am currently 30 years old. I recently began documenting the key points of my life that have led me to become who I am today. It's been a therapeutic experience to say the least, but if you enjoy reading and finding humor in trauma, maybe you'd enjoy the life stories I post on reddit.com/r/bottomshelfvodka Anywho. Here's some memes.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1204 (normal amount pepperoni)
item.description:
In my case, it was a vegan version of a Ruben I had almost 12 years ago when I was in Boston that tasted more like the real thing than most actual Reuben sandwiches. Granted, I got violently ill afterwards, but whatever. Let's get this bread.
Just gonna leave this here.
Ptolemy I Soter after taking control of Egypt in the chaos after the death of Alexander the Great.
I hate it.
I have to get a new computer mouse this morning so I can work on my invoice for job number two and get paid. Also so I can play games and work on labels for upcoming mead projects, but mostly so I can get paid I dont wanna go to walmart but thats the only place open early that has computer mice. Ugh.
Same, probably.
Mood.
Ah, soul-crushing late capitalist dystopia.
Or silk in summer.
I wish someone would hold me tight, whisper nice reassuring things in my ear, and let me cry/scream into their shoulder like it was a pillow. Had a lovely meltdown last night.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Fuck you. I love you. [Disembodied Conure screaming]"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Images of Note: Weird Knowledge increased
item.description:
yeah
Imagine voting for voter ID laws and not being able to vote.
d r i p ?
We don't have any bears in Scotland...except in Zoos. The Sunbears in Edinburgh Zoo are pretty goofy.
That's kinda baller
This is sweet and cute.
Geoguessr players take note
Get fisted.
:D
Hell yeah
They WILL not be stopped
He colonized the fucking book
wonderful
Please survive, even if it's out of spite. Too many of us have been killed and those that want us dead have used it as an excuse to deny we even existed.
HELL YEAH
I find it wild how we live in a world where a company can take away all legal access to readily made films from the general public and make money from it.
outrageous
oh no
Well that was unexpected
Yeah that's Evangelion.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also TWATCH: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: This is the Yaybahar, an acoustic instrument with a hauntingly captivating sound. It was developed in the 21st century and is not manufactured commercially. (Audio)
item.description: Wiki - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yaybahar?wprov=sfla1 The spring reverb on this particular setup is crazy good. Loving this sound.

item.dc:creator: marsilies

item.title: "And why are they looking for me?"
item.dc:creator: fiddlewheelx

item.title: Zeus
item.description: This is Zeus. He miraculously survived a tornado that tossed him across his neighborhood in his crate. When it tore through his town in Nebraska last week with maximum wind speeds of 165 miles per hour, Zeus was inside in his kennel. The sudden cyclone completely flattened their home, but Zeus' crate was found four blocks away with a broken door, and he was found two blocks away patiently waiting on a mattress for help. Rescuers believe the crate saved his life. The pup, who ironically shares a name with the Greek god of the sky, sustained only minor injuries: a scrape on his nose, a few torn toenails, and a sore hind leg. He's recuperating at a local boarding facility free of charge while his family works to rebuild their home. His caretakers say he's in great spirits despite everything he's been through.
item.dc:creator: dutch1970
